meta.title: TijaraFlow — Sync your e-commerce stores, automatically
meta.description: TijaraFlow connects WooCommerce and Shopify to a single dashboard: real-time stock, orders, customers and invoices synced automatically. Request a demo.

hero.subtitle: TijaraFlow connects your e-commerce stores to a single dashboard. A sale, a return, an order? Your stock, customers and invoices update in real time, with no manual entry.

problems.title: Managing stock across several tools costs time and money

items.title: Stockouts you don’t see coming
items.body: One sale on a store, and stock is out of date everywhere else. The result: overselling, disappointed customers, cancelled orders.

items.title: Manual entry wears you out
items.body: Re-typing every order, every customer, every product from one tool to another. Wasted time and errors guaranteed.

items.title: Fragmented visibility
items.body: Your sales are on WooCommerce, your stats elsewhere, your invoices in a third tool. Impossible to steer with confidence.

items.title: Invoices that slip through the cracks
items.body: An order delivered without an invoice sent means delayed cash flow and messy follow-up.

solution.title: Your whole e-commerce, synced and automated

items.title: Multi-platform sync
items.body: Connect WooCommerce, Shopify and soon others. Your products and orders come through automatically.

items.title: Real-time stock, both ways
items.body: A sale decrements stock; a cancellation or refund increments it back. Always accurate.

items.title: Automatic customers & orders
items.body: Every order creates the customer, the lines and updates the status with no intervention.

items.title: Automatic invoicing
items.body: Order delivered = invoice generated and e-mailed to the customer, automatically.

items.title: Secure by design
items.body: Webhook signing, per-customer API keys, anti-abuse protection. Your data stays protected.

items.title: Open API
items.body: A custom site or a not-yet-supported platform? Plug it in through our API.

steps.title: Connect your store
steps.body: Add your key in WooCommerce or Shopify in a few clicks. No development required.

steps.title: Everything syncs
steps.body: Products, orders, customers and stock come through in real time into your dashboard.

steps.title: Steer from one place
steps.body: Track your sales, stock and invoices — automated — all in one place.

items.a: WooCommerce and Shopify today, PrestaShop and Magento soon. And for any other site, an open API lets you connect.

items.q: How long to connect my store?
items.a: A few minutes: you generate a key, paste it into your store, and synchronization starts immediately.
Yes. Every exchange is signed (HMAC), each customer has their own key, and anti-abuse protection is in place.
No. Connecting is just pasting a key, with no development.
Yes: a sale decrements stock, and a cancellation or refund restores it automatically.

demo.title: See TijaraFlow on your own data
demo.subtitle: Book a 20-minute demo. We connect your store live and you leave with a clear view of what automation can save you.

demoForm.footnote: Reply within 24 business hours · No commitment

meta.title: Pricing — TijaraFlow
meta.description: Simple, transparent plans to sync and automate your e-commerce with TijaraFlow.

pricing.title: Simple pricing that grows with you
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Move to a higher plan as your volumes grow. No commitment, cancel anytime.
pricing.note: Need custom volume or hands-on support?

meta.title: Features — TijaraFlow
meta.description: Multi-store sync, real-time stock, orders, automatic invoicing, forecasts, reports and API. Discover everything TijaraFlow automates.

features.title: Your whole e-commerce, automated
features.subtitle: TijaraFlow connects your stores and handles the repetitive tasks, so you can focus on selling.

items.title: Multi-store synchronization
items.desc: WooCommerce and Shopify connected to a single dashboard. A sale, a return, a cancellation? Everything updates in real time, no entry.

items.title: Real-time stock
items.desc: Automatic decrement on every order, restock on cancellation/refund, and alerts as soon as a product drops below its threshold.

items.title: Centralized orders & customers
items.desc: All your orders and customer records in one place, whatever the source store, with full history.

items.title: Automatic invoicing
items.desc: Invoice (PDF) generated as soon as an order is delivered, and e-mailed to the customer — with nothing to do.

items.title: Stock forecasts
items.desc: Sales velocity calculation, estimated stockout date and suggested reorder quantities per product.

items.title: Reports & exports
items.desc: Revenue, top products, top customers and stock value over the period of your choice. CSV export in one click.

items.title: Automations
items.desc: Auto-invoicing, stock alerts, overdue reminders and weekly report: enable what you want, in one toggle.

items.title: Public API & webhooks
items.desc: A REST API and webhooks to connect any site or in-house tool. Custom integration possible.

items.title: Integrations hub
items.desc: Connection status, guided webhook setup and a real-time synchronization log.

cta.title: Ready to stop double data entry?
cta.subtitle: See TijaraFlow in action on your own store.

info.title: Fast reply

automations.title: Automations
automations.desc: Enable what StockFlow should do without any action from you.

auto_invoice.title: Automatic invoicing
auto_invoice.desc: Creates and sends an invoice to the customer as soon as an order is marked “Delivered”.

stock_alerts.title: Low stock alerts
stock_alerts.desc: Sends an email as soon as a product drops below its reorder threshold.

overdue_reminders.title: Overdue reminders
overdue_reminders.desc: Automatic reminders at D+7, D+15 and D+30 after an invoice due date.

weekly_report.title: Weekly report
weekly_report.desc: A summary of your activity (orders, revenue, stock) sent every Monday morning.

automations.lockedHint: Automations are available from the Pro plan.
automations.errPlan: Automations are reserved for the Pro plan or higher.

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Automations and integrations for your workspace.
settings.notifEmailDesc: Address that receives all automatic emails.
settings.automationsDesc: Auto invoicing, stock alerts, reminders, weekly report.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.desc: Use these keys to connect WooCommerce, Shopify or your own scripts.
apiKeys.copyNow: ⚠️ Copy this key now — it won't be shown again.
apiKeys.noKeys: No API keys — create one below.
apiKeys.confirmRevoke: Revoke the key “{name}”? Integrations using it will stop working.

woo.subtitle: Automatic synchronization of orders, customers, products
woo.step1: Generate an API key in the section above if you haven't already.
woo.step2: In WooCommerce: WooCommerce → Settings → Advanced → Webhooks → Add
woo.step4: Paste the URL below into the Delivery URL field (replace with your real API key).
woo.step5: Copy the Secret generated by WooCommerce and paste it into the field below.
woo.urlLabel: Webhook URL to paste into WooCommerce
woo.replaceKey: Replace {key} with your real API key (API keys section above).
woo.secretPlaceholder: Paste here the secret generated by WooCommerce
woo.secretHelp: Lets you verify that webhooks really come from your WooCommerce store.
woo.auto1: → New WC order | Customer upsert + order created + stock decremented
woo.auto2: → WC order “Completed” | PDF invoice generated + emailed to the customer
woo.auto3: → WC product updated | Price and stock synced in StockFlow
woo.auto4: → Stock below threshold | Alert email sent to your address

onboarding.title: Getting started
onboarding.step1Desc: It authenticates your store with StockFlow.
onboarding.step2Desc: Paste the webhook URL into WooCommerce and run a first synchronization.
onboarding.completeDesc: {count, plural, one {# product synced} other {# products synced}}. Everything is automatic from now on.
onboarding.webhookLabel: Webhook URL (WooCommerce) — to paste into your store
onboarding.wooInstructions: In WooCommerce → Settings → Advanced → Webhooks → Add: paste this URL, status Active, for topics Product created/updated/deleted and Order created/updated.

products_upsert.title: Create / update a product
products_upsert.desc: Creates a product or updates it if the SKU already exists.

customers_upsert.title: Create / update a customer
customers_upsert.desc: Creates a customer or updates it if the email already exists.

orders_list.title: List orders
orders_list.desc: Returns the latest 100 orders with the associated customer.

orders_create.title: Create an order
orders_create.desc: Creates an order and decrements stock. Identify the customer by email or id, products by SKU or id.
